name: bunjang-assistant
description: Run Bunjang tasks from Codex on macOS — market price lookup, listing search and ranking, chat and favorites management, and sales draft generation.

interface.shortDescription: Bunjang assistant for Codex on macOS — market price, search, chat, favorites, and sales drafts.
interface.longDescription: Bunjang assistant for Codex on macOS. Run market price lookups, listing search and ranking, chat and favorites management, and sales draft generation through natural-language requests. Short aliases such as 번개장터툴, 번개장터 도구, bunjang tool, and bunjang assistant route to the same entrypoint.
defaultPrompt: For market price requests, route through skills/bunjang/references/price.md.
For sales draft requests, route through skills/bunjang/references/sales.md.
Use npm run bunjang -- <capabilityId> '<paramsJson>' for supported CLI operations.
Do not run manual-only purchase, login, posting, or account-setting actions.
